---
title: "Corporate Lobbying of Bureaucrats"
author:
  - name: Michelle Lowry
    equal-contributor: true
  - name: Ekaterina Volkova
    equal-contributor: true
date: "2025-05-01"
categories: [lobbying, regulations, bureaucrats]
image: featured.png
description: "Working paper on corporate lobbying of bureaucrats"
---

<div class="btn-links" style="margin: 1.5rem 0;">
<a href="https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=5006884" class="btn btn-outline-primary" target="_blank">SSRN PDF (Free Access)</a>
<a href="/data/rule_relatedness" class="btn btn-outline-primary">Data</a>
</div>

![](featured.png){.featured-image fig-align="center"}

<p style="text-align:left; font-style:italic; font-size:16px; padding:10px;">
Presented at HKU Summer Finance Conference, Essex University, Manchester University, Lancaster University, McGill University, University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign, Sydney Banking and Financial Stability Conference
</p>

## Abstract

This paper examines how corporations engage with bureaucrats during the rulemaking process. We document patterns of corporate lobbying and their effects on regulatory outcomes.
